predicates.name: does_not_provide_proof_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person does not provide proof of possessing Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person legally qualifies as a foreigner.

predicates.name: not_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is not a citizen of the Union.

predicates.name: not_under_union_free_movement_law
predicates.description: The person is not covered by Union free-movement law as referred to by the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person legally qualifies as a third-country national.

predicates.name: present_on_territory
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory.

predicates.name: does_not_satisfy_entry_or_stay_conditions
predicates.description: The person does not or no longer satisfies the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

predicates.name: is_in_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person's presence legally qualifies as illegal stay.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsible_state_determination_or_transfer_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a procedure to determine or transfer to the member state responsible for examining an international-protection request.

predicates.name: subject_to_risk_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to one of the procedures relevant for assessing risk of absconding.

predicates.name: absconding_risk_is_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk that the person will abscond is current and real.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed.

predicates.name: all_case_circumstances_considered
predicates.description: All circumstances specific to the person's case have been considered.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
predicates.description: After illegal entry or during illegal stay, the person did not submit a residence application.

predicates.name: late_international_protection_request
predicates.description: The person did not make an international-protection request within the statutory time limit.

predicates.name: used_false_misleading_or_unlawful_means_in_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: In a relevant immigration procedure, the person used false or misleading information, false or forged documents, fraud, or other unlawful means.

predicates.name: does_not_cooperate_with_immigration_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for immigration rules.

predicates.name: will_not_or_did_not_comply_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure
predicates.description: The person has indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has not complied with, a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

predicates.name: will_not_or_did_not_comply_with_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has not complied with, an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

predicates.name: will_not_or_did_not_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has not complied with, a less coercive measure intended to ensure transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

predicates.name: will_not_or_did_not_comply_with_public_order_security_restrictive_measure
predicates.description: The person has indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has not complied with, a restrictive measure intended to guarantee public order or national security.

predicates.name: will_not_or_did_not_comply_with_equivalent_other_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person has indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has not complied with, an equivalent measure taken by another member state.

predicates.name: will_not_or_did_not_comply_with_relevant_measure
predicates.description: The person has indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has not complied with, a relevant measure listed by the law.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the state or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

predicates.name: new_application_immediately_after_refusal_end_or_removal
predicates.description: Immediately after a refusal, end-of-stay decision, refusal-of-entry measure, or removal measure, the person submitted a new residence application or international-protection request.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_bound_state_when_questioned
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed having previously given fingerprints in a state bound by the rules for determining the responsible state after an international-protection request.

predicates.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_or_no_residence_title_outcome
predicates.description: The person submitted multiple international-protection requests or residence applications that led to negative decisions or did not lead to a residence title.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_request_in_bound_state_when_questioned
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed having previously submitted an international-protection request in a state bound by the rules for determining the responsible state.

predicates.name: came_for_other_purpose_than_application_declared
predicates.description: The person declared, or the file shows, that the person came for purposes other than those of the international-protection request or residence application submitted.

predicates.name: fined_for_manifestly_abusive_appeal
predicates.description: The person is subject to a fine for filing a manifestly unlawful appeal before the immigration litigation council.

predicates.name: objective_absconding_criterion_present
predicates.description: At least one statutory objective criterion for risk of absconding is present for the person.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: The person legally presents a risk of absconding.

predicates.name: has_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document.

predicates.name: has_valid_passport
predicates.description: The person is in possession of a valid passport.

predicates.name: has_valid_identity_document
predicates.description: The person is in possession of a valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognized_as_national_by_country_authority
predicates.description: The national authority of the person's country has recognized the person as a national.

predicates.name: country_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The national authority of the person's country has declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: belongs_to_nationality_category_minister_can_issue_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person belongs to a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: has_valid_identification_document
predicates.description: The person has a valid travel, passport, or identity document for identification.

predicates.name: recognized_national_with_laissez_passer_offer
predicates.description: The person has been recognized as a national by the country authority that is willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The person legally qualifies as an identified foreigner.
